metadata.description: Skills for product planning, project scaffolding, and agentic development workflows.

plugins.name: product-context
plugins.description: Product-level planning and iteration: envision, map, model, dispatch, validate, calibrate, reflect, watch.

plugins.name: project-setup
plugins.description: One-time project scaffolding and environment setup: onboard, scaffold, e2e-skill-scaffolding.

plugins.name: agentic-development-workflow
plugins.description: Per-feature development lifecycle: design, launch, build, wrap.

plugins.name: patterns
plugins.description: Reusable design patterns: gen/eval, executor abstraction, autopilot orchestration, dynamic workflows, workflow-feedback, design-lens (HCI theory + heuristic health-check).
